# aigateway_fallback_chain (Resource)

Ordered fallback chain for a model: model_ids tried after this model's own deployments are exhausted. The gateway validates the chain (cycles, depth, referenced-model existence).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# If gpt-5.4's own deployments are exhausted, fall back to these in order.
resource "aigateway_fallback_chain" "gpt_5_4" {
  model_id        = aigateway_model.gpt_5_4.model_id
  fallback_models = ["gpt-5.4-mini", "gpt-4.1"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fallback_models` (List of String) Ordered list of model_ids to fall back to. Empty clears the chain.
- `model_id` (String) The model whose fallback chain this manages.
